-%09%22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc removeFromSet(mainSet %5B%5Dint, toBeRemoved %5B%5Dint) %5B%5Dint %7B%0A%09// Make map%0A%09mapaRemoveElements := make(map%5Bint%5Dbool)%0A%09for _, val := range toBeRemoved %7B%0A%09%09mapaRemoveElements%5Bval%5D = true%0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09%0A%09// Initialize slice and allocate capacity equal to mainSet slice%0A%09resultado := make(%5B%5Dint, 0, len(mainSet))%0A%09%0A%09%0A%09// Loop to check the boolean map%0A%09for _, val := range mainSet %7B%0A%09%09// If not in the map, the value becomes false%0A%09%09if !mapaRemoveElements%5Bval%5D %7B%0A%09%09%09resultado = append(resultado, val)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09return resultado%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09// Objective: Make two slices with the size n1 and n2, and fill them with user defined integers.%0A%09%0A%09var n1 int // First slice size%0A%09fmt.Scan(&n1)%0A%09%0A%09firstSet := make(%5B%5Dint, n1) // Create slice and store numbers in it%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C n1; i++ %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Scan(&firstSet%5Bi%5D) %0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09%0A%09var n2 int // Second slice size%0A%09fmt.Scan(&n2)%0A%09%0A%09secondSet := make(%5B%5Dint, n2) // Create slice and store numbers in it%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C n2; i++ %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Scan(&secondSet%5Bi%5D) %0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09%0A%09intSlice := removeFromSet(firstSet, secondSet)%0A%09%0A%09// Convert slice to string%0A%09tempString := fmt.Sprint(intSlice)%0A%09// Remove %22%5B%22 and %22%5D%22 from the string %0A%09resultado := strings.Trim(tempString, %22%5B%5D%22)%0A%09%0A%09// fmt.Println(firstSet)%0A%09// fmt.Println(secondSet)%0A%09fmt.Println(resultado)%0A%7D
